title: Java Backend Developer
description:
Job Description:
We are seeking a skilled and passionate Java Backend Developer to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in designing and developing scalable, high-performance backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture.

Key Responsibilities:
Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Java (preferably Java 11 or newer) and Spring Boot.
Build and manage RESTful APIs to support web and mobile frontends.
Develop and deploy microservices ensuring modular, scalable, and secure solutions.
Write efficient SQL queries and work with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQL Server.
Collaborate with front-end developers, DevOps, and QA teams to deliver complete features and solutions.
Participate in code reviews, unit testing, and performance tuning.
Ensure best practices in code quality, architecture, and security.

Required Skills:
Strong programming skills in Core Java (Java 8+)
Proficiency in Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and Spring Data JPA
Solid understanding of RESTful API design and development
Experience with Microservices architecture and deployment
Hands-on experience with SQL and relational databases
Familiarity with Git, Maven/Gradle, and CI/CD tools

title: Backend Developer
description:
Job Description:
We are seeking a skilled and passionate Senior Java Backend Developer to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in designing and developing scalable, high-performance backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture.

Key Responsibilities:
•	Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Java (preferably Java 11 or newer) and Spring Boot.
•	Build and manage RESTful APIs to support web and mobile frontends.
•	Develop and deploy microservices ensuring modular, scalable, and secure solutions.
•	Write efficient SQL queries and work with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQL Server.
•	Collaborate with front-end developers, DevOps, and QA teams to deliver complete features and solutions.
•	Participate in code reviews, unit testing, and performance tuning.
•	Ensure best practices in code quality, architecture, and security.

Required Skills:
Strong programming skills in Core Java (Java 8+)
•	Proficiency in Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and Spring Data JPA
•	Solid understanding of RESTful API design and development
•	Experience with Microservices architecture and deployment
•	Hands-on experience with SQL and relational databases
•	Familiarity with Git, Maven/Gradle, and CI/CD tools

title: Frontend Developer
description:
Required Technical Skillset:-
Strong expertise in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Angular (v15 or above).
Ability to build scalable, responsive, and accessible enterprise-grade user interfaces.
Experience implementing UI screens based on UX designs, wireframes, and visual design specifications.
Strong understanding of cross browser compatibility, responsive behavior, and performance optimization.
Experience integrating UI components with backend services and REST APIs.
Roles and Responsibilities:-
Develop and maintain responsive web applications using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Angular
Translate UX designs, wireframes, and visual specifications into high quality UI implementations
Ensure cross browser compatibility, responsiveness, and optimal performance across devices
Integrate UI components seamlessly with backend services and APIs
Adhere to coding standards, accessibility guidelines, and enterprise UI best practices
Perform unit testing, UI validation, and defect fixing
Collaborate closely with UX designers, backend engineers, and product stakeholders
Participate in code reviews and contribute to UI architecture and design decisions
Demonstrate strong ownership and accountability for UI deliverables with high attention to detail and quality.
